title: Create: Refactored
body:
[![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/create-refactored)‎ ‎ ‎‎[![discord-plural](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/social/discord-plural_vector.svg)](https://discord.gg/gPxWNEFYu9)‎ ‎‎ [![forge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/supported/forge_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/create-refactored/versions)‎

### Brief Description
A (relatively) lightweight create modpack with a heavy emphasis on its addons while being mostly themed around machining and automating as opposed to adventure and combat.

### Core Principles
1. **No other tech mods** – Applied Energistics and similar technology mods are excluded. While *Create* is technically a tech mod, its focus on rotational power keeps it closer to a vanilla-style experience.  
2. **No terrain generation mods** – to maintain a lightweight modpack and preserve the classic Minecraft world feel. 
3. **No large-scale content mods** – with the main exceptions being Create and, to an extent, Farmer’s Delight, which fit the pack’s balanced, semi-vanilla theme. 
4. **No diesel or overpowered energy systems** – excludes modern or unfitting power generation to maintain the vanilla-style mechanics.

### Modlist
The modlist for each version is under the dependencies section on each version page.

### Support
To report an issue/make a suggesion/share feedback, join the [discord](https://discord.gg/gPxWNEFYu9).

### Incompatible Mods:
- [Dreams & Desires](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-dreams-and-desires)
- [Create: Extended Cogwheels](https://modrinth.com/mod/extended-cogwheels)
- [Create: Blueprint Void](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-blueprint-void)
- [Create: Vintage Improvements](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-vintage-improvements)
- [Create: Unify](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-unify)
- [Create: Colored Casing](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-colored-casing)
- [Create: Dynamic Lights](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-dynamic-lights)
- [Remove Reloading Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/rrls)
